title: Renamed Leather Armor
description: Renames leather armor to be consistent with all other armor types!
body:
## ✅ Pack features

- Renames leather cap, leather tunic, and leather pants to leather helmet, leather chestplate, and leather leggings to have consistent names with all other armor types.
- Note: This resource pack **only** works in English!

## ℹ️ Frequently Asked Questions

**Q:** What Minecraft versions is this resource pack compatible with?

**A:** This resource pack is probably compatible with all Minecraft Java versions, and does **NOT** require Optifine. If you are playing in a version below 1.21, you can safely ignore the "made for a new version of Minecraft" warning.

**Q:** What is your backstory behind making this resource pack?

**A:** I've always been annoyed that leather armor SPECIFICALLY, is named leather cap, leather tunic, leather pants, and leather boots, which is the ONLY armor type to use the words cap, tunic, and pants. When searching up "helmet", "chestplate", or "leggings" in the creative menu, it shows me all the armor types EXCEPT leather. So that's why I decided to make this resource pack to fix that issue! Finally, the leather armor's name is now consistent with the rest of the armor types. Peace of mind!

## 💟 Love the things I do?

- Show your support by following this project! 🥰
- Check out my other projects here as well: https://modrinth.com/user/PhanZon/

## 🤝 Terms and Conditions of Use

**You are allowed to:** 
- Do _whatever_ you want to this Resource Pack **as long as** it's for **PERSONAL USE ONLY.**
- Modify this Resource Pack for public use **as long as** it's free for the community to use, you do not monetize it, you credit me in a clear way, **and** link back to this page.

**You are NOT allowed to:**

- Distribute this Resource Pack **without** crediting me in a clear way and/or linking back to this page.
- Reupload this Resource Pack as is (**without** proper modifications and/or additions).
- Put **any kind** of paywall restriction or monetization on **any parts** of this Resource Pack.
- Distribute this Resource Pack in a way that **does not** abide by the license used [(CC BY-NC-SA)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

**A template you can use to credit me:**

### Credits:
- [Resource Pack Name] by PhanZon: [Link back to this page]

Anything is fine **as long as** it clearly shows my name and a link back to this page!

## © Additional Credits

- Based on the work by Mojang on minecraft.net
